description: An event manager is finalizing the BEO for a wedding reception, including menu choices, timeline, and AV requirements.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the draft event contract and confirm the final guest count with the client.

expected_outcome.value: Agent pulls the contract and confirms a final count of 150 guests.

nodes.task_description: Update the BEO with the final menu selections (chicken or fish) and special dietary needs.

expected_outcome.value: Agent updates the BEO with all food and beverage details.

nodes.task_description: Generate the final BEO and send it to the client for signature and to the kitchen and operations teams for execution.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates and distributes the final BEO to all stakeholders.
